# SCPreferences

**Class**

The handle to an open preferences session for accessing system configuration preferences.

## Declaration

```swift
class SCPreferences
```

## Data Types

- **SCPreferencesContext**: A structure containing user-specified data and callbacks for accessing system configuration preferences.
- **SCPreferencesCallBack**: Type of the callback function used when the preferences have been updated or applied.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
